managerContact.name: Vastra Demo Support Manager
managerContact.hours: 10 AM - 7 PM IST, Monday to Saturday

policies.shipping: Orders are shipped within 24-48 hours. Delivery usually takes 3-7 business days depending on the pincode.
policies.return: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused products with original tags and packaging. Return requests are allowed only after the order status is Delivered.
policies.exchange: Size exchanges are accepted within 7 days of delivery, subject to stock availability.
policies.cod: Cash on Delivery is available on eligible pincodes. COD may require phone verification before dispatch.
policies.refund: Prepaid refunds are processed to the original payment method after quality check. COD refunds are processed via bank transfer or UPI.
policies.size: Customers should use the product size chart. If between two sizes, choose the larger size for a comfortable fit.

faqs.question: How do I choose the right size?
faqs.answer: Check the size chart on each product page. If you are between two sizes, choose the larger size for a comfortable fit.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take?
faqs.answer: Delivery usually takes 3-7 business days after dispatch, depending on the customer pincode.

faqs.question: What is the return policy?
faqs.answer: Returns are accepted within 7 days after delivery for unused products with original tags and packaging.

faqs.question: Which payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: Customers can pay using UPI, cards, net banking, wallets, and Cash on Delivery where available.

widgetConfig.welcomeMessage: Hi, welcome to Teviq Vastra Demo support. Ask me about orders, returns, sizing, or COD.

escalationRules.response: I understand this is sensitive. I am connecting this to a senior support manager for priority help.
